description: ARCH-04 lightweight hint registry. Exploration-only: these entries MAY be used to probe for first-party evidence, but MUST NEVER be treated as first-party evidence themselves. Every hint requires provenance, last_verified, and an expiry. Expired hints are filtered out by the loader.

policy.verification_required_against: restaurant first-party domain or cached first-party bundle

hints.notes: Locator subdomains (locations.tropicalsmoothiecafe.com) have no promo content; corporate root hosts the promo grid.
Locator pages list hours, not deals. Corporate value menu is the canonical deal surface.
